pr.title: Record: 9L MLP3x Full Stack + Custom Kernel Pipeline, val_bpb=1.1401

output.summary: 9-layer GQA transformer uses SmearGate+BigramHash, Muon optimizer, SWA, NTK-RoPE, and int6+zstd-22 with custom fused Triton kernels for faster training.
techniques: Muon optimizer with SWA warmdown and orthogonal muP init
SmearGate+BigramHash GQA with NTK-RoPE and 3×MLP expansion
Custom Triton kernels fusing RMSNorm+QKV, ReLU² MLP, and softcap+CE operations
